name: Amazon Bedrock MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Amazon Bedrock — AWS's managed foundation model service giving access to Claude (Anthropic), Titan (Amazon), Llama (Meta), Mistral, and other models via a unified API. Enables AI agents to call foundation models, manage model evaluation, and leverage Bedrock's Knowledge Bases and Agents via MCP.
use_cases: Calling Claude, Titan, or other models via Bedrock from enterprise AI agent workflows
Querying Bedrock Knowledge Bases for RAG from enterprise knowledge management agents
Managing Bedrock model evaluation and fine-tuning jobs from MLOps agents
Leveraging Bedrock Agents with action groups from complex orchestration agents
not_for: Direct API calls to AI providers without AWS infrastructure
Consumer AI applications (Bedrock is enterprise/developer focused)
Organizations without AWS accounts and Bedrock model access
best_when: An AWS-centric enterprise wants to use foundation models via their existing AWS infrastructure — getting model access with AWS VPC support, data residency, compliance, and unified billing.
avoid_when: You can call providers directly — Bedrock adds latency and cost overhead. FINANCIAL RISK: Bedrock billing is per-token and charges pass through AWS account.

auth.notes: AWS IAM credentials (access key + secret or IAM role). Use IAM roles with minimum permissions (bedrock:InvokeModel). Never use root credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; on-demand billing per token
pricing.paid_tiers: Per token pricing varies by model: Claude 3.5 Sonnet ~$0.003/1K input tokens
pricing.notes: AWS billing per token with no minimum commitment. Model access requires AWS Bedrock activation per region.

performance.rate_limits: Bedrock rate limits by model and account tier; throttling per minute

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: LLM token costs bill directly to AWS account — implement cost controls
Model access must be explicitly requested per region in AWS console
IAM permissions for Bedrock must be granted explicitly — not default
Bedrock Knowledge Base queries incur additional OpenSearch Serverless costs
Community AWS sample MCP — verify against current Bedrock SDK version
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Token costs bill to AWS. IAM credentials must use minimum permissions. Enterprise compliance posture (HIPAA, FedRAMP, SOC1/2). VPC support for data isolation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise AWS AI with HIPAA, FedRAMP, SOC1/2. IAM role-based access. VPC support. Data residency by region selection.
